metadata.title:
TO INTEREST MEN


IN Y. w. E. A. WORK

pages.raw_text:
The following announcement has
been issued by Mrs. J. M. Simpson,
Mrs. H. c. Blair, Mrs. A. w. Doland.
committee on Young Women's
Christian association work:


A banquet will be given at the
Masonic Temple, Tuesday evening,
June-15, at $3.50 p. M, in the inter
est of considering the establish
ment id Spokane of headquarters
for the territorial committee, and
training school of the national
Young Women's Christian associa-
ton for the northwest; also to con-
slider something of vital impor-
lance to the local work, in which
every business man should have an
interest.


This meeting Is particularly de-
signed to give the busy men of
Spokane better understanding of
the objects and aims of our prac-
teal Christian work, aid and pro-
lection to our girls and the home.


Come out and enjoy the novelty
of listening to banquet toasts re,
sponded to by the women of Spo-
kane; also noted women speakers
of other states. who will grace the
occasion with their presence. II
will be well worth while.
